crash_type: Use-of-uninitialized-value / buffer over-read (parser not halted after encoding-switch failure)
signature: static int xmlSwitchInputEncodingInt(xmlParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlParserInputPtr input, xmlCharEncodingHandlerPtr handler, int len)
params: ctxt: the parser context (state machine driving the parse)
input: the input stream whose encoding is being switched
handler: the encoding handler to install on input->buf
len: number of bytes to convert for the first line, or -1 for all
harness_callchain: LLVMFuzzerTestOneInput -> htmlReadMemory(docBuffer, docSize, ...) -> htmlDoRead -> htmlCtxtReadMemory/htmlParseDocument -> htmlCurrentChar/encoding detection -> xmlSwitchEncoding / xmlSwitchToEncoding -> xmlSwitchInputEncodingInt (ctxt->html != 0 path calls xmlCharEncInput; on nbchars < 0 hits the unguarded return(-1) at parserInternals.c:1124 without xmlHaltParser, so parsing continues and later over-reads in htmlParseHTMLAttribute = arvo:57223)
